case_title: FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC vs. INTHRAPHUVASAK, VUTTHISAK AKA et al

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT INTHRAPHUVASAK, VUTTHISAK AKA VUTTISAK INTHRAPHUVASAK
